Name: poppler
Description: PDF rendering library based on xpdf 3.0
Licenses: GPL-2.0-only GPL-3.0-or-later LGPL-2.0-or-later LGPL-2.1-or-later MIT HPND-sell-variant
Depends On: libjpeg cairo fontconfig openjpeg2 lcms2 nss curl gpgme nspr libpng freetype2 zlib libtiff
Optional Deps: poppler-data: highly recommended encoding data to display PDF documents with certain encodings and characters
